01 / About

I turn messy data into decisions someone can actually act on.

I'm a Computer Science & Mathematics graduate from St. Aloysius University, Mangalore, and a data analyst who's spent the past year building end-to-end BI work — from raw data cleaning in Python and SQL to dashboards in Power BI and Tableau that get used in real meetings, not just admired.

Most recently I completed a Data Analyst internship at Emdata Networks, and I take on freelance Power BI projects on the side. I care about the "so what" behind a chart more than the chart itself.

02 / Case Studies

Two projects, end to end.

Flagship Project

Airbnb NYC Investment & Host Performance Analysis

A 4-page Power BI report covering NYC Airbnb listings end to end — overview map, host performance, pricing, and availability — plus a Random Forest model to predict nightly price. Built across Python, MySQL, Power BI, Power Query, and DAX.

337K+
Listings Analyzed
36.5K+
Hosts
R² 0.54
Price Model Fit
  • Manhattan has the highest average listing price among neighbourhoods.
  • A small number of hosts manage a large share of listings — and top hosts get significantly more reviews than average.
  • Entire homes/apartments command the highest average price; shared rooms have the highest availability.
PythonMySQLPower BIPower QueryDAXScikit-learn
View on GitHub →

Marketing Analytics

Customer & Marketing Analytics Dashboard

A Power BI dashboard segmenting 10,000 customers by behaviour and value — surfacing who's a loyalist, who's at risk of churning, and where acquisition spend is actually paying off — built with custom DAX measures across CLV, CAC, and campaign conversion.

10K
Customers
$323K
Avg Customer LTV
33.1%
Campaign CVR
  • "Potential Loyalist" and "Loyal Customer" are the two largest segments — together the core of retained revenue.
  • Churn sits at 3.46% overall, with "At Risk" and "Lost" segments isolated for targeted win-back campaigns.
  • Acquisition is spread almost evenly across 5 channels (Social, Email, Referral, Paid Ads, Organic) at ~$1.61K average CAC — no single channel dominates.
Power BIDAXSQLRFM Modeling
